what: Add Deck.gl PathLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowPathLayer
title: Add Deck.gl PathLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowPathLayer
text: Add Deck.gl PathLayer mapgl::maplibre() mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer.

title: Add Deck.gl PathLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowPathLayer
code: addGeoArrowPathLayer(   map,   data = NULL,   url = NULL,   layer_id = "path",   geom_column_name = attr(data, "sf_column"),   popup = NULL,   tooltip = NULL,   render_options = renderOptions(),   data_accessors = dataAccessors(),   popup_options = popupOptions(),   tooltip_options = tooltipOptions(),   ... )

title: Add Deck.gl PathLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowPathLayer
text: map mapgl::maplibre() mapgl::mapboxgl() map add layer . data sf (MULTI)LINESTRING object. url URL remotely hosted geoarrow geoparquet file added map. Ignored data supplied. layer_id layer id. geom_column_name name geometry column sf object. inferred automatically one present. popup popup contructed? TRUE, create popup fromm available attributes feature. Can also character vector column names, case popup include columns. single character supplied, shown features. NULL (deafult) FALSE, popup shown. tooltip tooltip contructed? TRUE, create tooltip fromm available attributes feature. Can also character vector column names, case tooltip include columns. single character supplied, shown features. NULL (deafult) FALSE, tooltip shown. render_options list renderOptions data_accessors list dataAccessors popup_options list popupOptions tooltip_options list tooltipOptions ... currently used.

text: map mapgl::maplibre() mapgl::mapboxgl() map add layer . data sf (MULTI)POINT object. url URL remotely hosted geoarrow geoparquet file added map. Ignored data supplied. layer_id layer id. geom_column_name name geometry column sf object. inferred automatically one present. popup popup contructed? TRUE, create popup fromm available attributes feature. Can also character vector column names, case popup include columns. single character supplied, shown features. NULL (deafult) FALSE, popup shown. tooltip tooltip contructed? TRUE, create tooltip fromm available attributes feature. Can also character vector column names, case tooltip include columns. single character supplied, shown features. NULL (deafult) FALSE, tooltip shown. render_options list renderOptions data_accessors list dataAccessors popup_options list popupOptions tooltip_options list tooltipOptions ... can used pass additional props parameters deck.gl instance. See Details info.

title: Add Deck.gl ScatterplotLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowScatterplotLayer
text: ... can used pass additional props parameters deck.gl instance fine-tuning rendering behaviour. example, can pass list called parameters settings control GPU pipeline deck.gl instance. See https://luma.gl/docs/api-reference/core/parameters list available prarmeters. default, deck.gl layers passed maplibre() map drawn top existing ones. , however, possible inject layers existing maplibre layers passing interleaved = TRUE via .... combination render_options = renderOptions(beforeId = "<-existing-layer-id>") plot current layer underneath "<-existing-layer-id>".

title: Add Deck.gl ScatterplotLayer to a mapgl::maplibre() or mapgl::mapboxgl() map using blazing fast nanoarrow::write_nanoarrow() data transfer. — addGeoArrowScatterplotLayer
Deck.gl data accessors — dataAccessors
text: deck.gl every layer type specific set data accessors, see e.g. ScatterPlotLayer. function sets defaults available layer functions package.

title: Deck.gl data accessors — dataAccessors
Deck.gl data accessors — dataAccessors
text: ... named accessors passed relevant deck.gl JavaScript Method.

title: Deck.gl data accessors — dataAccessors
text: Please refer relevant deck.gl documentation detailed description available layer functions. See Details list currently available accessors, defaults layer types apply . want map certain accessor data specific value, need add data provide column name respective data accessor. Currently, following accessors automatically set following defaults: getRadius = 1 (ScatterplotLayer) getColor = c(0, 0, 0, 255) (ScatterplotLayer, PathLayer) getFillColor = c(0, 0, 0, 130) (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) getLineColor = c(0, 0, 0, 255) (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) getLineWidth = 1 (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) getElevation = 1000 (PolygonLayer) getWidth = 1 (PathLayer) NOTE: accessors getPosition, getPath, getPolygon handled internally set! get*Color accessors accept either vector rgb() integers (0-255) hex color string (potentially also alpha) - see examples.

title: Deck.gl data accessors — dataAccessors
code: # default accessors dataAccessors() #> $getRadius #> [1] 1 #>  #> $getColor #> [1]   0   0   0 255 #>  #> $getFillColor #> [1]   0   0   0 130 #>  #> $getLineColor #> [1]   0   0   0 255 #>  #> $getLineWidth #> [1] 1 #>  #> $getElevation #> [1] 1000 #>  #> $getWidth #> [1] 1 #>   # modify selected accessors dataAccessors(   getFillColor = c(0, 0, 255, 130),   getLineColor = "#ff00ffaa" ) #> $getRadius #> [1] 1 #>  #> $getColor #> [1]   0   0   0 255 #>  #> $getFillColor #> [1]   0   0 255 130 #>  #> $getLineColor #> [1] "#ff00ffaa" #>  #> $getLineWidth #> [1] 1 #>  #> $getElevation #> [1] 1000 #>  #> $getWidth #> [1] 1 #>

what: Generate proper internal layer ids — generateDeckglLayerId
title: Generate proper internal layer ids — generateDeckglLayerId
text: Deck.gl injects layers maplibre's canvas interleaved = TRUE (default layer functions provided ). , generates specific layer ids layer_id provided. function generates deck.gl specific layer ids R side, can used controls, mapgl::ad_layers_control().

title: Generate proper internal layer ids — generateDeckglLayerId
Generate proper internal layer ids — generateDeckglLayerId
text: layer_id layer id provided respective addGeoArrowDeckgl* layer function used. beforeId beforeId used respective addGeoArrowDeckgl* layer function used.

title: Generate proper internal layer ids — generateDeckglLayerId

what: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
title: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
text: Options popups tooltips

title: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
text: ... named options passed popups tooltips map. See maplibregl PopupOptions details available options.

title: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
text: popupOptions tooltipOptions passed PopupOptions object maplibregl Popup constructor. See maplibregl PopupOptions details. popupOptions tooltipOptions package differ respective defaults. : popupOptions anchor = "bottom" className = "geoarrow-deckgl-popup" closeButton = TRUE closeOnClick = TRUE closeOnMove = FALSE focusAfterOpen = TRUE maxWidth = "none" offset = 0 subpixelPositioning = FALSE tooltipOptions anchor = "top-left" className = "geoarrow-deckgl-tooltip" closeButton = FALSE closeOnClick = FALSE closeOnMove = FALSE focusAfterOpen = TRUE maxWidth = "none" offset = 0 subpixelPositioning = FALSE

title: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
text: popupOptions(): options popups tooltipOptions(): options tooltips

title: Options for popups and tooltips — popupOptions
code: # default popupOptions() #> $anchor #> [1] "bottom" #>  #> $className #> [1] "geoarrow-deckgl-popup" #>  #> $closeButton #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $closeOnClick #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $closeOnMove #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $focusAfterOpen #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $maxWidth #> [1] "none" #>  #> $offset #> [1] 0 #>  #> $subpixelPositioning #> [1] FALSE #>  tooltipOptions() #> $anchor #> [1] "top-left" #>  #> $className #> [1] "geoarrow-deckgl-tooltip" #>  #> $closeButton #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $closeOnClick #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $closeOnMove #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $focusAfterOpen #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $maxWidth #> [1] "none" #>  #> $offset #> [1] 0 #>  #> $subpixelPositioning #> [1] FALSE #>   # modify selected options tooltipOptions(anchor = "bottom-right", className = "my-css-class-name") #> $anchor #> [1] "bottom-right" #>  #> $className #> [1] "my-css-class-name" #>  #> $closeButton #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $closeOnClick #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $closeOnMove #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $focusAfterOpen #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $maxWidth #> [1] "none" #>  #> $offset #> [1] 0 #>  #> $subpixelPositioning #> [1] FALSE #>

title: Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
text: deck.gl every layer type specific set render options, see e.g. ScatterPlotLayer. function sets defaults available layer functions package. Please refer relevant deck.gl documentation detailed description available layer functions. See Details list currently available options, defaults layer types apply .

title: Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
text: ... named options passed relevant deck.gl JavaScript Method.

title: Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
text: list named options, possibly modified via ... argument.

title: Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
text: Currently, following options automatically set following defaults: radiusUnits = "pixels" (ScatterplotLayer) radiusScale = 1 (ScatterplotLayer) lineWidthUnits = "pixels" (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) lineWidthScale = 1 (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) stroked = TRUE (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) filled = TRUE (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) radiusMinPixels = 3 (ScatterplotLayer) radiusMaxPixels = 15 (ScatterplotLayer) lineWidthMinPixels = 0 (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) lineWidthMaxPixels = 15 (ScatterplotLayer, PolygonLayer) billboard = FALSE (ScatterplotLayer, PathLayer) antialiasing = FALSE (ScatterplotLayer) extruded = FALSE (PolygonLayer) wireframe = TRUE (PolygonLayer) elevationScale = 1 (PolygonLayer) lineJointRounded = FALSE (PolygonLayer) lineMiterLimit = 4 (PolygonLayer) widthUnits = "pixels" (PathLayer) widthScale = 1 (PathLayer) widthMinPixels = 1 (PathLayer) widthMaxPixels = 5 (PathLayer) capRounded = TRUE (PathLayer) jointRounded = FALSE (PathLayer) miterLimit = 4 (PathLayer) beforeId = NULL (Layer types)

title: Deck.gl render options — renderOptions
code: # default settings renderOptions() #> $radiusUnits #> [1] "pixels" #>  #> $radiusScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $lineWidthUnits #> [1] "pixels" #>  #> $lineWidthScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $stroked #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $filled #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $radiusMinPixels #> [1] 3 #>  #> $radiusMaxPixels #> [1] 15 #>  #> $lineWidthMinPixels #> [1] 0 #>  #> $lineWidthMaxPixels #> [1] 15 #>  #> $billboard #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $antialiasing #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $extruded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $wireframe #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $elevationScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $lineJointRounded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $lineMiterLimit #> [1] 4 #>  #> $widthUnits #> [1] "pixels" #>  #> $widthScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $widthMinPixels #> [1] 1 #>  #> $widthMaxPixels #> [1] 5 #>  #> $capRounded #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $jointRounded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $miterLimit #> [1] 4 #>  #> $beforeId #> NULL #>   # modify selected options renderOptions(radiusUnits = "meters", radiusScale = 10) #> $radiusUnits #> [1] "meters" #>  #> $radiusScale #> [1] 10 #>  #> $lineWidthUnits #> [1] "pixels" #>  #> $lineWidthScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $stroked #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $filled #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $radiusMinPixels #> [1] 3 #>  #> $radiusMaxPixels #> [1] 15 #>  #> $lineWidthMinPixels #> [1] 0 #>  #> $lineWidthMaxPixels #> [1] 15 #>  #> $billboard #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $antialiasing #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $extruded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $wireframe #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $elevationScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $lineJointRounded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $lineMiterLimit #> [1] 4 #>  #> $widthUnits #> [1] "pixels" #>  #> $widthScale #> [1] 1 #>  #> $widthMinPixels #> [1] 1 #>  #> $widthMaxPixels #> [1] 5 #>  #> $capRounded #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $jointRounded #> [1] FALSE #>  #> $miterLimit #> [1] 4 #>  #> $beforeId #> NULL #>
